name: carlos-story-theories
description: Single-file offline HTML story reader with Web Speech API + Mini Arcade.

scripts.start: node -e "const http=require('http');const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const port=process.env.PORT||3000;const root=process.cwd();const mime={'.html':'text/html','.js':'text/javascript','.css':'text/css','.png':'image/png','.jpg':'image/jpeg','.jpeg':'image/jpeg','.svg':'image/svg+xml','.gif':'image/gif','.json':'application/json','.txt':'text/plain'};http.createServer((req,res)=>{let url=(req.url||'/').split('?')[0];if(url==='')url='/';let file=path.join(root,url);if(file.endsWith(path.sep)) file=path.join(file,'index.html');if(!fs.existsSync(file)) {res.statusCode=404;res.end('Not Found');return;}const ext=path.extname(file).toLowerCase();res.setHeader('Content-Type',mime[ext]||'application/octet-stream');res.end(fs.readFileSync(file));}).listen(port,()=>console.log('Serving '+root+' at http://localhost:'+port));"
scripts.open: node -e "const {exec}=require('child_process'); const url='http://localhost:3000'; const cmd=process.platform==='win32'?('start '+url):('open '+url); exec(cmd,()=>{});"
